basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Havildar (Security) Notification 2026 has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website https://bel-india.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 43 years. Age Relaxation: OBC (NCL) 3 years, SC/ST 5 years.

qualification.details: Havildar (Security): SSLC + 15 years of service in Indian Armed Forces.

salary_details.details: WG-III/CP-III Rs. 20500-3% 79000+ Admissible Perks/Allowances CTC- Rs. 6.2 Lakhs (Approx.)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download BEL Havildar (Security) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download BEL Havildar (Security) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BEL Havildar (Security) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BEL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BEL Havildar (Security) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Havildar (Security): SSLC + 15 years of service in Indian Armed Forces.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 43 years. Age Relaxation: OBC (NCL) 3 years, SC/ST 5 years.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: WG-III/CP-III Rs. 20500-3% 79000+ Admissible Perks/Allowances CTC- Rs. 6.2 Lakhs (Approx.)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026 is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Havildar (Security) post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required is SSLC (Pass) along with a minimum of 15 years of service in the Indian Armed Forces.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Havildar (Security) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Havildar (Security) post is 43 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Havildar (Security) position?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Physical Endurance Test followed by a Written Test.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Havildar (Security) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is WG-III/CP-III Rs. 20500-3% 79000+, with an approximate CTC of Rs. 6.2 Lakhs per annum including perks and allowances.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Havildar (Security) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies available for the Havildar (Security) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. In which city and state is this recruitment taking place?
faq.answer: This recruitment is taking place in Pune, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application is strictly online through the official BEL website.

faq.question: Q10. Does BEL offer any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, BEL offers an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates as per government norms.
